svg.text: • 211. Add and Search Word — wildcard with DFS over '.'
• 1268. Search Suggestions System — DFS to collect bottom-3 alphabetically
• 642. Design Search Autocomplete — trie + frequency aggregation
• 720. Longest Word in Dictionary — prefix-walkable longest
• 14. Longest Common Prefix — trivial trie or zip-and-compare
• 212. Word Search II — trie + grid DFS
• 421. Maximum XOR of Two Numbers — bit-trie, greedy descent
• 1707. Maximum XOR With Element From Array — bit-trie + offline queries
• 745. Prefix and Suffix Search — two tries (one for reversed words)
• 336. Palindrome Pairs — trie of reversed words
Reach for trie when prefixes are queried many times against a dictionary.
